body.title: [sprint] Consequence check: Dick escalation chain design
body.intention: I intend that the escalation chain produces no silent token burns or infinite escalation loops.
body.description:
**What changed:** Dick's escalation produces structured summaries; creator tier intercepts before master.
**Predicted effects:** Summary generation burns extra tokens on every escalation (model must summarize before handing off). Creator tier may not have tools to resolve what builder couldn't — adds latency without value if tier gap is small.
**Signals to watch:** Escalation rate by tier (builder→creator vs creator→master). Token cost per escalated ticket vs pre-chain. Any tickets that loop (escalate → re-dispatch → escalate again).
**Gate:** Check by 2026-06-24.
**Affected files:** None — observation only
**Scope boundary:** Observe escalation patterns; annotate efficient/wasteful/looping
**Completion criteria:** Checked escalation logs; annotated outcome; filed follow-up tickets for any 'looping' or 'wasteful' patterns found.
**Test plan:** no tests — observation ticket
